auth.loginSubtitle: Kota mpo na kolanda ba commande na yo mpe kofuta nokinoki.
auth.signupSubtitle: Kota na One Source mpo na biloko ya sika ekotisami na Ouganda mobimba.
auth.accountSubtitle: Bokisa profil na yo mpe ba commande.
auth.passwordMismatch: Ba lijambo ya kobomba ekokani te.
auth.passwordTooShort: Lijambo ya kobomba esengeli ezala na ba caractère 6 to.
auth.checkEmail: Tala email na yo mpo na kondima kompte, sima kota.
auth.notConfigured: Authentification ekokani te. Bakisa VITE_SUPABASE_URL mpe VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY na fichier .env na racine ya projet (clé anon publique na Supabase → Paramètres du projet → API).
auth.forgotPasswordTitle: Zongisa lijambo ya kobomba na yo
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Tyá email na yo mpe tokotinda yo lien mpo na kopona lijambo ya kobomba ya sika.
auth.resetEmailSent: Soki compte ezali na email wana, okozwa lien ya kozongisa lijambo ya kobomba kala te.
auth.resetPasswordTitle: Pona lijambo ya kobomba ya sika
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Tyá mpe kondima lijambo ya kobomba na yo ya sika awa na nsé.
auth.passwordUpdated: Lijambo ya kobomba na yo ebongisami. Okoki kokota na lijambo ya kobomba na yo ya sika.
auth.resetLinkInvalid: Lien oyo ya kozongisa ezali malamu te to esili ngonga. Senga ya sika mpo na kokoba.

products.emptyCategory: Biloko moko te na catégorie oyo. Leka filtre mosusu.

1.title: Ba pomme ya sika – Premium, paquet ya 5
1.description: Ba pomme ya sukali mpe ya sika. Malamu mpo na kolia to pâtisserie. Ba fournisseur ya Ouganda oyo bato batyaka motema.
1.delivery: Livraison GRATUITE mokolo moko kobanda na 100 000 USh

2.title: Ba banane Fairtrade – emûri, pene 5
2.description: Ba banane Fairtrade oyo emûri na ndenge ya nature. Malamu mpo na smoothie, céréale to na nzela.

3.title: Brocoli ya sika – tête ya monene
3.description: Brocoli ya vitaminé. Na vapeur, rôti to sauté.

4.title: Tomate grappe – 450 g
4.description: Tomate ya sukali oyo emûri na nzete. Salade, sauce mpe sandwich.

5.title: Laitue iceberg – ya sika
5.description: Laitue ya sika. Base ya salade César mpe burger.

6.title: Basilic ya sika – pot ya bomoi
6.description: Plant ya basilic ya bomoi. Kata ba feuille mpo na pâtes, pesto mpe bilei ya Italie.

7.title: Carotte bio – 500 g
7.description: Carotte bio certifiée. Ya sukali, ya sika, rôti to na jus.

8.title: Avocat bio – prêt na kolia, paquet ya 2
8.description: Avocat Hass bio, emûri mpo na kolia. Toast, salade mpe guacamole.

9.title: Pomme de terre – cuisson, 2 kg
9.description: Pomme de terre ya ndenge nyonso. Purée ya malamu, rôti ya sika.

10.title: Oignon rouge – filet 1 kg
10.description: Oignon rouge ya malamu. Salade, curry mpe caramélisation.

11.title: Fraise ya sika – barquette 400 g
11.description: Fraise ya saison ya sukali. Dessert mpe smoothie.

12.title: Myrtille – 150 g
12.description: Myrtille ya malamu, ya antioxidant. Petit-déjeuner mpe collation.

13.title: Mandarine – sans pépin, 600 g
13.description: Mandarine ya malamu pétalo pétalo. Goûter mpe vitamine C.

14.title: Citron – monene, paquet ya 3
14.description: Citron ya jus mpo na cuisine, pâtisserie mpe boisson.

15.title: Mangue emûri – monene
15.description: Mangue ya sukali mpe ya nsolo. Salade de fruit, smoothie to salade.

16.title: Ananas doré – moyen
16.description: Ananas doré ya tropique. Grillé, mixé to ya sika.

17.title: Poire Conference – 4 pièce
17.description: Poire Conference ya jus. Fromage to salade.

18.title: Courgette ya sika – 3 pièce
18.description: Courgette ya malamu. Spirale, grillé to au four.

19.title: Salade mélangée – 120 g batongolaki
19.description: Ba feuille batongolaki: roquette, épinard, frisée. Fungola, pesá.

20.title: Épinard bio – 200 g
20.description: Épinard bio ya moke. Pâtes, smoothie to salade.

21.title: Maïs doux – 2 épi
21.description: Épi ya maïs doux. Bouilli to na barbecue.

22.title: Framboise ya sika – 125 g
22.description: Framboise ya nsolo. Dessert, yaourt to ya sika.

23.title: Pamplemousse ruby – 2 pièce
23.description: Pamplemousse ruby ya moto. Petit-déjeuner ya acidité.

24.title: Fruit de la passion – 3 pièce
24.description: Fruit de la passion ya nsolo. Pavlova, cheesecake to salade tropicale.

product.sourcedValue: Ba elanga mpe ba coopérative ya Ouganda

product.legalDisclaimerText: Emballage mpe matériaux ya solo ekoki kozala na makambo mingi koleka oyo emonisami na site na biso. Kotya kaka te na makambo awa; soma ntango nyonso ba étiquette, ba avertissement mpe ba mode d'emploi liboso ya kosalela to kolia.
product.disclaimerText: Makambo na site oyo epesami kaka mpo na boyebi. Benga fabricant mpo na allergène to usage médical. One Source Ouganda azali na responsabilité te mpo na makambo ya sika te ya ba fournisseur ya misato.
product.reviewsHowItWorks: Ba avis ya client esalisaka yo koyeba produit mpe kondima soki ekokani na yo.
product.topReviews: Ba avis ya Ouganda oyo eleki
product.sampleReview1Body: Ya sika mpe ekokani na description. {{product}} ebongisami malamu. Nalingi kopesa conseil.
product.sampleReview2Body: Achat ya malamu. Livraison na tango, biloko esalemi mbala moko.
product.rollOverToZoom: Roll over image to zoom in
product.customersSayNote: Ekelami na ba thème ya avis na biloko ya sika oyo ekokani.
product.sampleReview3Body: Ekomi na tango, ebongisami malamu. Ekokani na oyo etiamaki.

storage.coolDry: Esika ya malili to na frigo.
storage.roots: Esika ya malili, ya molili mpe ya mopepe. Sala na ba semaine 2.
storage.chilled: Bomba na frigo 0–4 °C. Tala date na emballage.

about.yam1: Igname ya pembe ezali bilei ya liboso na Afrika mpe Caraïbes — tubercule ya féculent na peau ya marron mpe chair ya pembe.
about.yam2: Bouillir, frire to rôtir. Eteki mingi na foutou to igname pilée na soup mpe ragoût.
about.yam3: Lapola problème na biloko oyo ekufa na ba heure 24 nsima ya livraison.
about.chilli1: Ba piment ya sika — malamu mpo na sauce, marinade mpe bilei ya tradition.
about.chilli2: Bomba na malili to na frigo.
about.chilli3: Lapola problème ya qualité na ba heure 24 nsima ya livraison.
about.freshCategory: {{category}} ya sika kowuta na ba elanga mpe ba coopérative ya Ouganda.
about.report24h: Lapola problème ya qualité ya biloko oyo ekufa na ba heure 24 nsima ya livraison.
about.primeEligible: Ekoki na Prime — livraison mokolo moko na ba commande oyo ekokani.

description.farmFresh: {{name}} ya sika kowuta na elanga na One Source Ouganda.
description.yam1: Igname ya pembe ya sika na peau ya marron mpe chair ya féculent. Ekolami na mabele ya malamu, baponami mpo na kobika.
description.yam2: Bouillir, frire to rôtir. Ingredient ya foutou, igname pilée mpe bilei ya Afrika mingi.
description.yam3: Biloko ya {{origin}}. Lapola problème ya livraison ya biloko oyo ekufa na ba heure 24.

customersSay.freshQuality: Ba client balingaka ete ezali ya sika mpe ya qualité
customersSay.mixedQuality: Ba client bazali na avis ya ndenge na ndenge na qualité
customersSay.concerns: Ba client mosusu balapoli problème ya qualité
customersSay.yamNote: — fraîcheur mpe taille ekoki kozala ndenge na ndenge na livraison
customersSay.chilliNote: — piquant mpe maturité ekokani na variété
customersSay.defaultNote: — valeur mpe emballage bazali na avis ya ndenge na ndenge

warranty.p1: Biloko ya sika ezali na garantie ya fraîcheur na biso. Benga service client na ba heure 24 nsima ya livraison soki ezali kobebisama to qualité moke — ba photo soki ekoki.
warranty.p2: Remboursement to remplacement na libondeli ya One Source Ouganda selon politique ya retour na biso.
warranty.p3: Ata na makoki ya mibeko, biloko mingi ekoki kozongisama na ba jour 30 soki ekokani. Tala ba exception.
